category_sources: source_facts.description says imgproxy is a fast and secure server for resizing and converting remote images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name lists the project name as imgproxy.
docs_sources: Official dedicated docs domain for imgproxy is docs.imgproxy.net.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies remote image resizing/conversion server behavior; source_facts.repo identifies the official Go project repository.
